subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Qablí-'Alí! Verily the heaven proclaimeth this Most Great Name, and the sun crieth out, declaring: "It hath been diffused!" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قبل علی ان السماء تنادی بهذا الاسم العظیم و الشمس تصیح و تقول قد تضوع
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
